rewrite_purpose: Guide reviewers to add disclaimers for before/after or transformation imagery that may mislead about typical outcomes.
summary: Add disclaimer that before/after or transformation imagery does not represent typical outcomes for all users.
rewrite_guidance: TRIGGER: Before/after, transformation, or results imagery for supplements or cosmetics. ACTION: Add visible disclaimer about non-typical outcomes and individual variation. CHECK: Image sequencing, timeframe claims, and supporting substantiation. ESCALATE IF: Implied guaranteed transformation without disclaimer.
review_guidance: ESCALATE IF: Before/after imagery implies medical or therapeutic outcomes.

measurable_criteria.scoring_notes: must_include_concepts checked on playbook rewrite guidance text.

rewrite_independence_rationale: Standalone before/after disclosure rewrite guidance; independent of claim-class skill modules.
